Script.name: GaldamUI
Script.script:
GaldamUI = GaldamUI or {} if GaldamUI._handlers then for _, id in ipairs(GaldamUI._handlers) do pcall(killAnonymousEventHandler, id) end end GaldamUI._handlers = {} local PANEL_W = 0.22 -- 못 가는 방향: 빨간 대각선 금지 빗금 local CSS_OFF = "background: qlineargradient(x1:0, y1:0, x2:1, y2:1, stop:0.42 rgba(20,13,15,255), stop:0.46 #cc2b2b, stop:0.54 #cc2b2b, stop:0.58 rgba(20,13,15,255)); border:2px solid #7a2e2e; border-radius:6px; color:#9a7478; font-size:22px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignCenter';" -- 커스텀 이미지 GaldamUI.imgDir = getMudletHomeDir() .. "/galdamui" pcall(function() lfs.mkdir(GaldamUI.imgDir) end) local IMGBASE = "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/Binkaze/galdamoosound@main/" local IMGFILES = {"up-arrow.png","down arrow.png","left-arrow.png","right-arrow.png","up.png","down.png","in.png","out.png","look.png","search.png"} local function imgPath(f) return GaldamUI.imgDir .. "/" .. f end local CSS_BTN = "background-color: rgba(34,84,116,205); border:2px solid #4fa3c7; border-radius:8px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignCenter';" local CSS_ACT = "background-color: rgba(38,70,48,215); border:2px solid #5fae6f; border-radius:8px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignCenter';" local function imgTag(f, sz) return "
" end function GaldamUI.downloadImages() for _, f in ipairs(IMGFILES) do local lp = imgPath(f) if not (io.exists and io.exists(lp)) then downloadFile(lp, IMGBASE .. (f:gsub(" ", "%%20"))) end end end function GaldamUI.build() if GaldamUI.panel then GaldamUI.panel:hide() end GaldamUI.panel = Geyser.Container:new({name="GaldamPanel", x="-22%", y=0, width="22%", height="100%"}) GaldamUI.info = Geyser.Label:new({name="GaldamInfo", x=0, y=0, width="100%", height=84}, GaldamUI.panel) GaldamUI.info:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(15,25,35,235); border:1px solid #2a4a5a; border-radius:6px; color:#cfe8f0; qproperty-alignment:'AlignCenter';") GaldamUI.info:echo("
갯담마을
") local gy = 88 local function gauge(name, label, color) local g = Geyser.Gauge:new({name=name, x=0, y=gy, width="100%", height=28}, GaldamUI.panel) g.front:setStyleSheet("background-color:"..color.."; border-radius:5px;") g.back:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(40,40,40,200); border-radius:5px;") g.text:setStyleSheet("color:#ffffff; font-size:20px; padding-left:6px;") g:setValue(100,100,""..label..""); gy = gy + 30; return g end GaldamUI.hp = gauge("GaldamHP", "체력", "#c0392b") GaldamUI.thirst = gauge("GaldamThi", "목마름", "#2471a3") GaldamUI.hunger = gauge("GaldamHun", "배고픔", "#d68910") GaldamUI.stress = gauge("GaldamStr", "스트레스", "#f1c40f") -- 이미지 d-pad GaldamUI.dpad = Geyser.Container:new({name="GaldamDpad", x=0, y=216, width="100%", height=200}, GaldamUI.panel) GaldamUI.dirBtns = {} local function dbtn(nm, name, img, cmd, aliases, x, y) local b = Geyser.Label:new({name=nm, x=x, y=y, width="32%", height=58}, GaldamUI.dpad) b:setClickCallback(function() send(cmd) end) b:setStyleSheet(CSS_BTN); b:echo(imgTag(img, 42)) table.insert(GaldamUI.dirBtns, {btn=b, aliases=aliases, img=img, name=name}) return b end dbtn("dpUp", "위", "up.png", "올라가기", {"올라가기","up","u","위","상"}, "0%", 0) dbtn("dpN", "북", "up-arrow.png", "북", {"북","north","n"}, "34%", 0) dbtn("dpIn", "들어가기", "in.png", "들어가기", {"들어가기","in","enter","안","입구"}, "68%", 0) dbtn("dpW", "서", "left-arrow.png", "서", {"서","west","w"}, "0%", 66) dbtn("dpE", "동", "right-arrow.png", "동", {"동","east","e"}, "68%", 66) dbtn("dpDn", "아래", "down.png", "내려가기", {"내려가기","down","d","아래","하"}, "0%", 132) dbtn("dpS", "남", "down arrow.png", "남", {"남","south","s"}, "34%", 132) dbtn("dpOut", "나가기", "out.png", "나가기", {"나가기","out","밖","출구","exit"}, "68%", 132) -- 보기 (중앙, 항상 활성) GaldamUI.lookBtn = Geyser.Label:new({name="dpLook", x="34%", y=66, width="32%", height=58}, GaldamUI.dpad) GaldamUI.lookBtn:setStyleSheet(CSS_ACT); GaldamUI.lookBtn:echo(imgTag("look.png", 42)) GaldamUI.lookBtn:setClickCallback(function() send("look") end) -- 찾기 (항상 활성) GaldamUI.act = Geyser.Container:new({name="GaldamAct", x=0, y=424, width="100%", height=52}, GaldamUI.panel) GaldamUI.searchBtn = Geyser.Label:new({name="acSearch", x=0, y=0, width="100%", height=48}, GaldamUI.act) GaldamUI.searchBtn:setStyleSheet(CSS_ACT); GaldamUI.searchBtn:echo(imgTag("search.png", 40)) GaldamUI.searchBtn:setClickCallback(function() send("search") end) -- 수배: 패널 밖 좌상단 독립 오버레이 (GTA식) — 수배>0 일 때만 if GaldamUI.wanted then GaldamUI.wanted:hide() end GaldamUI.wanted = Geyser.Label:new({name="GaldamWan", x="-43%", y=4, width="20%", height=66}) GaldamUI.wanted:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(22,14,28,235); border:1px solid #5a3a6a; border-radius:6px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignCenter';") GaldamUI.wanted:hide() -- "수배" 글자색 천천히 빨강<->파랑 순환 (generation guard 로 재로드 시 옛 타이머 중단) GaldamUI.cycleGen = (GaldamUI.cycleGen or 0) + 1 GaldamUI.cyclePhase = 0 GaldamUI.cycleStep(GaldamUI.cycleGen) -- 지도창 pcall(function() if not GaldamUI.mapWin then GaldamUI.mapWin = Geyser.UserWindow:new({name="갯담지도", width=520, height=430, x=900, y=620}) end GaldamUI.mapWin:setFontSize(14) GaldamUI.mapWin:cecho("\n 지도 없음") end) GaldamUI.built = true end function GaldamUI.layout() setBorderRight(math.floor((getMainWindowSize()) * PANEL_W)) end function GaldamUI.setExits(elist) if not GaldamUI.dirBtns then return end local avail = {} for _, e in ipairs(elist or {}) do avail[tostring(e)] = true end for _, d in ipairs(GaldamUI.dirBtns) do local on = false for _, al in ipairs(d.aliases) do if avail[al] then on = true; break end end if on then d.btn:setStyleSheet(CSS_BTN) d.btn:echo(imgTag(d.img, 42)) else d.btn:setStyleSheet(CSS_OFF) d.btn:echo("
"..d.name.."
") end end end function GaldamUI.refresh() if not GaldamUI.built then return end pcall(function() GaldamUI.lookBtn:setStyleSheet(CSS_ACT); GaldamUI.lookBtn:echo(imgTag("look.png", 42)) GaldamUI.searchBtn:setStyleSheet(CSS_ACT); GaldamUI.searchBtn:echo(imgTag("search.png", 40)) end) GaldamUI.onRoom() end function GaldamUI.onRoom() local r = gmcp.Galdam and gmcp.Galdam.Room if not (GaldamUI.built and r) then return end GaldamUI.info:echo(string.format("
%s
%s
", r.name or "?", r.area or "")) GaldamUI.setExits(r.exits or {}) end function GaldamUI.cycleStep(gen) if gen ~= GaldamUI.cycleGen then return end GaldamUI.tick = (GaldamUI.tick or 0) + 1 GaldamUI.cyclePhase = (GaldamUI.cyclePhase or 0) + 0.25 GaldamUI.renderWanted() tempTimer(0.1, "GaldamUI.cycleStep("..gen..")") end function GaldamUI.renderWanted() if not (GaldamUI.built and GaldamUI.wanted) then return end local tier = GaldamUI.curTier or 0 if tier <= 0 then GaldamUI.wanted:hide(); return end local tick = GaldamUI.tick or 0 local bl = GaldamUI.blink if bl and tick >= bl.endTick then GaldamUI.blink = nil; bl = nil end -- 수배 글자 (빨강<->파랑 순환, 크게) local t = (math.sin(GaldamUI.cyclePhase or 0) + 1) / 2 local col = string.format("#%02x%02x%02x", math.floor(204+(43-204)*t), math.floor(43+(107-43)*t), math.floor(43+(204-43)*t)) -- 별 6개 (자리별 깜빡 처리) local stars = "" for i = 1, 6 do local ch, c if bl and bl.set[i] then local on = (math.floor(tick / bl.interval) % 2) == 0 ch = "★" if bl.kind == "add" then c = on and "#f1c40f" or "#473807" else c = on and "#f1c40f" or "#ffffff" end elseif i <= tier then ch = "★"; c = "#f1c40f" else ch = "☆"; c = "#444444" end stars = stars .. ""..ch.."" end -- 표시 줄 (항목 늘면 창 자동 확장) local lines = {} lines[#lines+1] = "수배" lines[#lines+1] = stars -- (미래) 죄목/경찰대응: table.insert(lines, "...") local h = 18 + #lines * 42 if GaldamUI.wantedH ~= h then pcall(function() GaldamUI.wanted:resize("21%", h) end); GaldamUI.wantedH = h end GaldamUI.wanted:echo("
"..table.concat(lines, "
").."
") GaldamUI.wanted:show() end function GaldamUI.onVitals() local v = gmcp.Char and gmcp.Char.Vitals if not (GaldamUI.built and v) then return end if v.hp then GaldamUI.hp:setValue(tonumber(v.hp) or 0, tonumber(v.hp_max) or 100, "체력 "..tostring(v.hp).."/"..tostring(v.hp_max).."") end if v.thirst then local t=tonumber(v.thirst) or 0; GaldamUI.thirst:setValue(math.min(t,500),500,string.format("목마름 %d",math.floor(t))) end if v.hunger then local h=tonumber(v.hunger) or 0; GaldamUI.hunger:setValue(math.min(h,500),500,string.format("배고픔 %d",math.floor(h))) end if v.stress then local s=tonumber(v.stress) or 0; GaldamUI.stress:setValue(math.min(s,500),500,string.format("스트레스 %d",math.floor(s))) end if v.wanted then local w = tonumber(v.wanted) or 0 local nt = (w>=171 and 6) or (w>=141 and 5) or (w>=101 and 4) or (w>=61 and 3) or (w>=31 and 2) or (w>=1 and 1) or 0 local prev = GaldamUI.prevTier or 0 if nt > prev then local set = {}; for i = prev+1, nt do set[i] = true end GaldamUI.blink = {set=set, interval=5, endTick=(GaldamUI.tick or 0)+30, kind="add"} elseif nt < prev and nt > 0 then local set = {}; for i = 1, nt do set[i] = true end GaldamUI.blink = {set=set, interval=2, endTick=(GaldamUI.tick or 0)+20, kind="remove"} end GaldamUI.prevTier = nt GaldamUI.curTier = nt GaldamUI.renderWanted() end end function GaldamUI.onMap() local d = gmcp.Galdam and gmcp.Galdam.Map if not (GaldamUI.built and GaldamUI.mapWin and d) then return end GaldamUI.mapWin:clear() if d.has == 1 and d.grid then local raw = d.grid:gsub("<>", "\27"):gsub("<>", "\n") GaldamUI.mapWin:decho(ansi2decho(raw)) else GaldamUI.mapWin:cecho("\n 지도 없음 (갯담 지도 필요)") end end if not GaldamUI.built then GaldamUI.build() end GaldamUI.layout() GaldamUI.downloadImages() table.insert(GaldamUI._handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Room", function() GaldamUI.onRoom() end)) table.insert(GaldamUI._handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Char.Vitals", function() GaldamUI.onVitals() end)) table.insert(GaldamUI._handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Map", function() GaldamUI.onMap() end)) table.insert(GaldamUI._handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("sysWindowResizeEvent", function() GaldamUI.layout() end)) table.insert(GaldamUI._handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("sysDownloadDone", function() GaldamUI.refresh() end)) GaldamUI.onRoom(); GaldamUI.onVitals(); GaldamUI.onMap()
